description: Tobias Sammet founded and leads Avantasia.
Tobias Sammet is the singer and main songwriter of Edguy.
Jørn Lande is one of the recurring Avantasia guest vocalists.
Jørn Lande was a major vocalist in Masterplan.
Jorn is Jørn Lande's solo band and recording project.
Jørn Lande sang with Ark.
Jørn Lande was associated with Vagabond.
Jørn Lande appeared with Beyond Twilight.
Allen/Lande pairs Jørn Lande with Russell Allen.
Russell Allen is the other lead vocalist of Allen/Lande.
Russell Allen fronts Symphony X.
Magnus Karlsson wrote and played on Allen/Lande material.
Magnus Karlsson is linked to Primal Fear as guitarist.
Magnus Karlsson is a core member of Starbreaker.
Michael Kiske is a key Avantasia guest vocalist.
Michael Kiske became famous as vocalist of Helloween.
Michael Kiske sang in Unisonic.
Michael Kiske is the vocalist of Place Vendome.
Michael Kiske collaborated with Amanda Somerville in Kiske/Somerville.
Kai Hansen was a founding Helloween member.
Kai Hansen founded Gamma Ray.
Kai Hansen played with Michael Kiske in Unisonic.
Kai Hansen appeared as an Avantasia guest.
Bob Catley is a recurring Avantasia guest vocalist.
Bob Catley fronts Magnum.
Bob Catley is associated with Hard Rain.
Eric Martin has appeared as an Avantasia guest.
Eric Martin fronts Mr. Big.
Geoff Tate appeared as an Avantasia guest vocalist.
Geoff Tate is best known as former Queensrÿche vocalist.
Ronnie Atkins has appeared with Avantasia.
Ronnie Atkins fronts Pretty Maids.
Ronnie Atkins sings in Nordic Union.
Erik Mårtensson is the other principal Nordic Union collaborator.
Erik Mårtensson fronts Eclipse.
Erik Mårtensson is part of W.E.T.
Jeff Scott Soto sings in W.E.T.
Jeff Scott Soto fronted Talisman.
Jeff Scott Soto sang in Sons of Apollo.
Jeff Scott Soto appeared with Avantasia.
Tommy Karevik is part of newer Avantasia guest activity.
Tommy Karevik fronts Kamelot.
Tommy Karevik fronts Seventh Wonder.
Roy Khan was Kamelot's vocalist before Tommy Karevik.
Roy Khan fronts Conception.
Roy Khan appeared as an Avantasia guest.
Adrienne Cowan appears in newer Avantasia activity.
Adrienne Cowan fronts Seven Spires.
Adrienne Cowan has worked in Sascha Paeth related metal circles.
Sascha Paeth is a central Avantasia guitarist producer and collaborator.
Sascha Paeth played guitar in Heavens Gate.
Sascha Paeth leads Masters of Ceremony.
Sascha Paeth contributed to the Aina metal opera project.
Amanda Somerville contributed vocals and vocal work around Avantasia.
Amanda Somerville fronts Trillium.
Amanda Somerville collaborated with Michael Kiske in Kiske/Somerville.
Amanda Somerville contributed to Aina.
Floor Jansen has appeared as an Avantasia guest vocalist.
Floor Jansen fronts Nightwish.
Floor Jansen fronted After Forever.
Floor Jansen founded and fronted ReVamp.
Herbie Langhans has worked with Avantasia as guest musician and vocalist.
Herbie Langhans sang for Firewind.
Herbie Langhans sang in Sinbreed.
Herbie Langhans sings in Radiant.
Herbie Langhans sang in Seventh Avenue.
Oliver Hartmann has been a live and studio collaborator with Avantasia.
Oliver Hartmann sang in At Vance.
Hartmann is Oliver Hartmann's solo band.
Timo Tolkki appeared as guest guitarist on early Avantasia material.
Timo Tolkki was a central Stratovarius guitarist and songwriter.
Timo Kotipelto fronts Stratovarius.
Alice Cooper appeared as a guest vocalist on Avantasia.
Alice Cooper is associated with the Alice Cooper Band.
Dee Snider appeared as a guest vocalist on Avantasia.
Dee Snider fronts Twisted Sister.
Miro is a long-time Avantasia keyboardist arranger and producer collaborator.
Miro's production and arranging work links many European metal productions.
Tobias Sammet has appeared in Rock Meets Classic contexts.
Masterplan connects to Helloween through Roland Grapow and Uli Kusch.
Gamma Ray connects to Helloween through Kai Hansen.
Unisonic reconnects Michael Kiske and Kai Hansen from the Helloween family.
Both projects are linked through Michael Kiske.
Primal Fear belongs to the German power metal scene linked to Sinner members.
